name: self-refuting-rag
description: **SR-RAG** is a multi-agent question answering system designed to improve factual accuracy and transparency through claim-level adversarial verification.

scripts.start: npm run stop:ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.start:logs: npm run stop:ports && mkdir -p logs/terminal && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run backend:dev:log" "npm run frontend:dev:log"
scripts.stop:ports: bash -lc 'for p in 8000 5173; do pid=$(lsof -ti tcp:$p); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then echo Stopping process on port $p: $pid; kill -9 $pid; fi; done'
scripts.backend:dev: bash -lc 'PY=${PYTHON_BIN:-/Users/adma/Documents/Sem6/GenAi/handson/.venv/bin/python}; OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false FAISS_THREADS=1 SR_RAG_FAISS_INDEX=flat KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK=TRUE "$PY" -m uvicorn chat_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'
scripts.backend:dev:reload: bash -lc 'PY=${PYTHON_BIN:-/Users/adma/Documents/Sem6/GenAi/handson/.venv/bin/python}; OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false FAISS_THREADS=1 SR_RAG_FAISS_INDEX=flat KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK=TRUE "$PY" -m uvicorn chat_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload'
scripts.backend:dev:log: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; PY=${PYTHON_BIN:-/Users/adma/Documents/Sem6/GenAi/handson/.venv/bin/python}; OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false FAISS_THREADS=1 SR_RAG_FAISS_INDEX=flat KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK=TRUE "$PY" -m uvicorn chat_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee logs/terminal/backend.log'
scripts.frontend:dev:log: bash -lc 'set -o pipefail; npm --prefix frontend run dev 2>&1 | tee logs/terminal/frontend.log'
